reviews.comment:
Excelente atención pero el Automóvil Club debería sacarle la concesión. Muy pocos surtidores y largas colas. No tiene un servivompras a los que nos tiene acostumbrado YPF. Nos dicen que el dueño no quiere invertir

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, but the Automobile Club should revoke their concession. Very few pumps and long lines. It doesn't have the convenience stores that YPF usually offers. We're told the owner doesn't want to invest.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtMl8zS1h3EAE
